scores.correctness_notes: Fully correct and matches the gold standard on all key points: basic usage, signature with params/wait, Task attributes (results, status, success, message, return_code, stdout, stderr, log, id), and all three exception types (TaskError, ValueError, TimeoutError). Adds extra valid detail throughout.
scores.hallucination_notes: task.raise_on_failure() is mentioned but not present in the gold standard — may or may not exist in jubilant. Minor uncertainty warrants a 1 rather than a confident 2 or 0.
